phases.title: Phase 1: Foundation

tasks.title: Create withSignal() HOF
tasks.description:
Create src/utils/signal.ts implementing the withSignal(name, fn) higher-order function per contracts/signal.md. Must: time execution via performance.now(), emit [exit:N | duration] on stderr, set process.exitCode (not process.exit()), catch all errors. Duration: <1s → Nms, ≥1s → N.Ns. Create src/utils/signal.test.ts with unit tests per TR-001.
REVIEW FAIL (lint): noInferrableTypes — style.
  WHERE: src/utils/signal.ts:9:18
  EXPECTED: public exitCode = 1 (type inferred)
  ACTUAL: public exitCode: number = 1
  FIX: Remove : number from the parameter.
  GATE: pnpm lint
  REF: plan.md Phase 1.1

tasks.title: Wrap all command actions with withSignal()
tasks.description:
Retrofit all 24 .action() callbacks across 19 command files to use withSignal(). Files: define.ts, specify.ts, plan.ts, implement.ts, tasks-generate.ts, ship.ts, test.ts, measure.ts, effort.ts, compression.ts, pulse.ts (2 actions), tasks.ts (4 actions: done/list/next/ready), runs.ts, stats.ts, db.ts, server.ts (3 actions), status.ts, init.ts, setup-slack.ts. Each action wrapped as: await withSignal('command-name', async () => { existing logic }). Remove direct process.exit() calls from action bodies — withSignal handles exit codes.
REVIEW FAIL (code): Regression in existing tests — US-001.
  WHERE: src/commands/*.test.ts (20+ tests)
  EXPECTED: Tests pass when checking error conditions or exit codes.
  ACTUAL: many tests resolve/fail because withSignal catches errors and sets process.exitCode, while tests expect rejection or process.exit(1).
  FIX: Update tests to check process.exitCode instead of expecting rejection. If using withSignal, command actions no longer throw to Commander; they set exitCode and return.
  GATE: pnpm test
  REF: plan.md Phase 1.1

tasks.title: Create CommandOutput abstraction
tasks.description:
Create src/utils/output.ts implementing the CommandOutput interface and createOutput(format) factory per contracts/output.md. Human mode: write() → stdout as text, info() → stderr. JSON mode: write() → JSON.stringify to stdout, info() → stderr. Create src/utils/output.test.ts with unit tests per TR-002.
REVIEW FAIL (code): Regression in JSON query tests — FR-002.
  WHERE: src/commands/tasks-query.test.ts (87:70, 125:70)
  EXPECTED: Tests capture output and verify JSON.
  ACTUAL: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '0'). logSpy.mock.calls is empty because createOutput writes to stdout, not console.log.
  FIX: Update tests to spy on process.stdout.write or provide a mock CommandOutput for testing.
  GATE: pnpm test
  REF: plan.md Phase 1.2

tasks.title: Add --format global flag to CLI
tasks.description:
Modify src/cli.ts to add program.option('--format <type>', 'Output format: human | json', 'human'). Validate format value — exit 2 on invalid (e.g., --format xml → 'Unknown format: xml. Supported: human, json'). Make format option accessible to all commands via Commander's opts() chain.
REVIEW FAIL (gate): Gate script T004-gate.sh failed — FR-002.
  WHERE: specs/013-agent-native-interface/gates/T004-gate.sh
  EXPECTED: Gate script passes (exits 0).
  ACTUAL: Exits 2 because gwrk returns 2 and set -e is on.
  FIX: Fix gate script to handle non-zero exit from gwrk (e.g., EXITCODE=0; gwrk ... || EXITCODE=$?).
  GATE: gates/T004-gate.sh
  REF: spec FR-002

tasks.title: Retrofit queryable commands for --format json
tasks.description:
Retrofit tasks.ts (list, next, ready subcommands) and status.ts to use CommandOutput from output.ts. When --format json: tasks list → { tasks: [...] }, tasks next → { task: {...} | null }, status → { project, specs, agents }. Human mode unchanged. Per plan Phase 1.2 queryable command table.
REVIEW FAIL (code): Regression in JSON query tests — FR-002.
  WHERE: src/commands/tasks-query.test.ts
  EXPECTED: JSON output captured and parsed.
  ACTUAL: logSpy empty because tasksCommand list/next uses createOutput.
  FIX: Update tests to spy on process.stdout.write or use a test-ready output abstraction.
  GATE: pnpm test
  REF: plan.md Phase 1.2

tasks.title: Create gwrk gate-check command
tasks.description:
Create src/commands/gate-check.ts per contracts/gate-check.md. Arguments: <task_id>, -f/--feature <dir>. Resolves gate script path: specs/<feature>/gates/<taskId>-gate.sh. Executes gate script, captures exit code + stdout + stderr. Returns GateCheckResult (DM-002). Supports --format json. Feature inference when -f omitted: glob specs/**/gates/<taskId>-gate.sh. Error-as-navigation on missing gate. Register in src/cli.ts. Create src/commands/gate-check.test.ts per TR-005.
REVIEW FAIL (gate): Gate script T006-gate.sh failed — FR-006.
  WHERE: specs/013-agent-native-interface/gates/T006-gate.sh: Assertion #3
  EXPECTED: grep -q 'gates/' matches code.
  ACTUAL: Code uses "gates" in path.join, not "gates/".
  FIX: Update gate script to match code pattern (grep -q '"gates"') or update code with slash (unsafe for path.join).
  GATE: gates/T006-gate.sh
  REF: spec FR-006

tasks.title: Standardize exit codes across all commands
tasks.description:
Audit all 19 command files. Ensure: 0=success, 1=expected failure (gate failed, feature not found), 2=usage error (missing args, invalid flags), 127=unknown command. Currently all errors use process.exit(1). Replace usage errors with exit 2. Configure Commander's exitOverride or custom handler for unknown commands → exit 127. Update withSignal to propagate error types. Per spec FR-009.
REVIEW FAIL (code): Regression in tests and gate fail — FR-009.
  WHERE: src/commands/*.test.ts (especially test-cmd.test.ts)
  EXPECTED: Usage errors return 2, and tests pass.
  ACTUAL: Tests expecting 1 for usage error now fail. Gate script T007-gate.sh also fails due to set -e.
  FIX: Update tests to expect 2 for usage errors. Fix gate script T007-gate.sh to handle non-zero exit from gwrk.

REVIEW FAIL (lint): noExplicitAny and noUselessElse — FR-009.
  WHERE: src/cli.ts:141:17 and src/commands/tasks.ts:61:11
  EXPECTED: Error caught with type (unknown/Error), no useless else in tasks.ts.
  ACTUAL: catch (err: any) and useless else after throw.
  FIX: Use unknown/Error type and remove else clause after throw.
  GATE: pnpm lint
  REF: spec FR-009, Step 4 & 6

doneWhen: `gwrk tasks list 000-tdd-infrastructure --format json | jq .` produces valid JSON
`gwrk gate-check T001 -f specs/000-tdd-infrastructure --format json | jq .result` returns string

phases.title: Phase 2: Discovery

tasks.title: Create project discovery engine
tasks.description: Create src/engine/discover.ts implementing discoverProject(root) per contracts/discover.md. Assembles ProjectDiscovery (DM-001) from repo-only sources: git state (git status, git branch, git log), spec inventory (glob specs/*/spec.md, derive status from plan.md/tasks.json existence), gate aggregation (execute gate scripts), config (.gwrkrc.json). MUST NOT read ~/.gwrk/gwrk.db or call localhost:18790 (TC-004). Create src/engine/discover.test.ts per TR-004 — mock filesystem, verify no sqlite/http calls.

tasks.title: Create gwrk project command group
tasks.description: Create src/commands/project.ts with parent command 'project' and 'discover' subcommand. Wire discoverProject() from discover.ts. Support --format json (via CommandOutput). Register project command in src/cli.ts. Human mode: formatted summary. JSON mode: full ProjectDiscovery schema. Create src/commands/project.test.ts per TR-006.

tasks.title: Add project specs and gates subcommands
tasks.description: Add 'specs' and 'gates' subcommands to project command in src/commands/project.ts. specs: list all specs with id, name, status, phase count, open tasks. gates: run all gate scripts and report task id, result (PASS/FAIL), duration. Both support --format json. Per spec FR-005.

tasks.title: Rewrite help text for agent discoverability
tasks.description: Rewrite --help text for all commands to include: command type (query/generator/verifier/mutator), exit codes section, available format options (--format json where queryable), mutation declarations where applicable. Use CommandMeta (DM-003) as static metadata co-located with each command definition. Per spec FR-008, TR-008.

tasks.title: Implement error-as-navigation across all commands
tasks.description: Systematic error message rewrite across all command files. Every error must include: (1) what failed, (2) corrective command to run, (3) --help reference. Pattern: '<what failed>. Run '<fix command>' to <resolution>. See '<related> --help'.' Per spec FR-007, TR-008. Audit every throw/console.error/process.exit path.

doneWhen: `gwrk project discover --format json | jq .project.name` returns project name
`gwrk project specs --format json | jq '.[0].status'` returns valid status

phases.title: Phase 3: Agent Mode

tasks.title: Create Layer 2 agent protections
tasks.description: Create src/utils/agent-layer.ts with processForAgent(output) composing: stripAnsi() (remove \x1b[...m sequences from src/utils/format.ts), guardBinary() (detect null bytes or >30% non-printable → '[binary content, N bytes]'), truncateOverflow() (trigger: >8192 bytes → first 100 lines + '/tmp/gwrk-output-<hash>.txt' reference). Create src/utils/agent-layer.test.ts per TR-003.

tasks.title: Wire --agent global flag
tasks.description: Add program.option('--agent', 'Enable agent mode: ANSI-stripped output with Layer 2 protections') to src/cli.ts. Also detect GWRK_AGENT=1 env var. When active, pipe all stdout through processForAgent() from agent-layer.ts. --agent does NOT change output format (TC-006). --agent and --format json compose independently.

tasks.title: Add stdin acceptance to define plan
tasks.description: Modify src/commands/define.ts: when process.stdin.isTTY is false, read stdin as JSON, write to /tmp/gwrk-discovery-<timestamp>.json, pass contextPath to agent dispatch prompt template. Enables pipeline: gwrk project discover --format json | gwrk define plan --spec <spec> --format json. Per plan Phase 3.2.

tasks.title: Create task classification engine
tasks.description: Create src/engine/classify.ts implementing classifyTask(touchPoints). Classification: greenfield (file doesn't exist), change (file exists, task modifies behavior), refactor (file exists, changes structure not behavior), noop (no code change). Called during gwrk define tasks to enrich tasks.json with classification field. Per plan Phase 3.3.

tasks.title: Enrich PhaseSchema with optional fields
tasks.description: Modify src/utils/state.ts: add optional fields to PhaseSchema: objective (z.string().optional()), scope ({in_scope, out_of_scope} z.object().optional()), classification_summary (z.record(z.number()).optional()), inputs ({spec_refs, project_signals} z.object().optional()). All .optional() — existing tasks.json files remain valid. Per plan Phase 3.4.

doneWhen: `gwrk project discover --format json | gwrk define plan --spec specs/000-tdd-infrastructure/spec.md --format json` pipeline connects
